opportunities.title: [Hiring] $15 to play on my Minecraft server for an hour (only first 30 people)
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] $15 to play on my Minecraft server for an hour (only first 30 people)

The title says it all. DM me your username in Minecraft. I’ll send you the server IP. Once you log in, it’ll timestamp on my server logs. And upon finishing an hour total, I’ll PayPal or Zelle, or LTC (your choice of the three) the $15. I’m only offering it to the first 30 people that DM me and stay in the server for the full hour. You can split it up. But as long as the logs say you’ve been on for 60 minutes and you have one of the three payment methods above, I will send you the $10.   submitted by   /u/N
